name: ndlaw
description: Search North Dakota primary law — Supreme Court & Court of Appeals opinions (1889–present), the Constitution, N.D.C.C. statutes, court rules, and the Administrative Code — via a remote MCP server.
long_description:
Connects Claude Desktop to a self-hosted ndlaw endpoint over Streamable HTTP with HTTP Basic Auth. The bundle ships `mcp-remote` inside the extension and invokes it with an absolute path, so it works regardless of whether `npx` is on the spawned Node process's PATH. Prompts for the server URL and credentials at install time.

Provides 26 tools across ND opinions and primary law (Constitution, N.D.C.C. statutes, court rules, Administrative Code): citation/authority lookup, point-in-time provision text, full-text search, citation tracing, citing-opinion lists, and more.

Note: the password field is stored as plaintext in the Claude Extensions Settings file (mode 0600, user-only readable). This is a workaround for a Claude Desktop bug where `sensitive: true` fields are stored encrypted but passed to env vars without decryption.

url.title: Server URL
url.description: The full URL of the ndlaw MCP endpoint, ending in /mcp.

password.title: Password
password.description: Password shared via secure channel. (Stored in plaintext in the user-only-readable settings file — workaround for a Claude Desktop bug with sensitive fields.)
